sections.subtitle: Team Form
sections.text: Sassuolo are struggling with consistency, managing just one win in their last five matches, with a notable 3-1 victory over Fiorentina but failing to keep a clean sheet in six games. Parma, on the other hand, have shown mixed results, securing two wins in their last five, including a 1-0 win against Fiorentina, but their attack remains underwhelming with only 11 goals scored this season.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head History
sections.text: In the last two head-to-head encounters, results have been split with Parma winning 1-0 in 2023 and Sassuolo dominating with a 3-0 victory in 2021. Matches between these sides often feature low-scoring affairs, with under 2.5 goals in 5 of their last 7 meetings.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Sassuolo, sitting 9th with 22 points, have a strong attacking output with 22 goals (6th in the league) but struggle defensively, conceding 21. Parma, 15th with 17 points, have a poor goal-scoring record (11 goals) and rely on defensive resilience, though their away form remains a concern.

sections.subtitle: Key Players to Watch
sections.text: Sassuolo’s Andrea Pinamonti (4 goals, 2 assists) and Ismael Koné (3 goals) could exploit Parma’s defensive lapses. For Parma, Mateo Pellegrino (4 goals) will be crucial in breaking through Sassuolo’s leaky defense.

sections.subtitle: Match Prediction
sections.text: Given Sassuolo’s superior attacking stats and home advantage at Mapei Stadium, coupled with Parma’s struggles to score, the Sofascore prediction of a 56% home win probability seems plausible. Expect a tight game, likely decided by a single goal.
